usage_instructions.implementation: Import this JSON file into your frontend application and use a translation library (i18next, react-intl, vue-i18n) to dynamically render content based on user language preference.
usage_instructions.adding_languages: To add a new language, copy the 'en' object structure and translate all values while keeping keys identical.
usage_instructions.rtl_support: For Arabic and other RTL languages, implement CSS direction: rtl and text-align: right in your frontend.
usage_instructions.fallback: Always set 'en' as the fallback language if a translation is missing.
usage_instructions.dynamic_loading: For performance, consider lazy-loading language files based on user selection rather than bundling all languages.
